description: Marks the start of a new AgentExecutor.exe invocation. AgentExecutor hosts BOTH platform scripts (Policies\Scripts\<id>.ps1) and proactive-remediation scripts (IMECache\HealthScripts\<id>\detect.ps1) and writes their lines interleaved into the shared AgentExecutor.log. The policyId-less 'Powershell exit code is N' / 'write output done' lines are otherwise routed to the last-started platform script via a sticky pointer, so a remediation invocation (whose start line does not match PS-AGENT-SCRIPT-START) leaks its exit/output into that platform script's result. This pattern resets the platform-script line-capture context at each invocation boundary so only the matching platform invocation captures its own exit/output.
